parameters.name: type
parameters.description: admin = staff users (no partner); partner = partner-portal users

delete.summary: Delete an account (self / last super_admin blocked)

post.summary: Admin login — sets the session cookie (admin audience only)
Log out of the admin audience (keeps a partner session)

get.summary: Current admin session user (401 for a non-admin session)

post.summary: Change the current session user’s password (clears mustChangePassword)

get.summary: List partners (for the "pick existing partner" dropdown)

post.summary: Create a partner-portal user linked to this partner
Generate an external API key for this partner — rawKey returned ONCE
Upload a CSV/XLSX for a period — parsed asynchronously

parameters.name: plate
parameters.description: Row key: normalized plate or manual_<detailId>

get.summary: One import detail row (prefill for the Edit form)

post.summary: Edit driver/plate on an import detail (assign plate to a manual-payment row, toggle setoran)

get.summary: Dashboard aggregates: summary cards + driver activity + charts
Read driver/target metadata for a plate
Whole-month performance detail for one driver (eye modal)

post.summary: Partner portal login — sets the session cookie

get.summary: One own order detail (403 for another partner’s order)

post.summary: Register a plate (nomor + Type) for the partner

put.summary: Edit one own registered plate (nomor + Type)

get.summary: Own Gojek 31-day deposit grid (scoped to registered plates)

parameters.name: plate
parameters.description: Row key: normalized plate or manual_<detailId>

get.summary: Own Gojek dashboard aggregates (cards + driver activity + charts)
Own Grab earnings grid (scoped to registered plates)
Own Grab driver whole-month performance detail
Route/car pricelist for the authenticated partner
Order history for the authenticated partner
One order's detail (own orders only — 404 for any other order)

info.title: fleet-taxi-dashboard-api
info.description: Fleet/deposit-reconciliation dashboard API. All money values are integer rupiah serialized as JSON numbers. Every response uses the standard envelope: `{ success: true, data, meta? }` on success, `{ success: false, error: { code, message, details? } }` on error.

roles.description: One or more staff roles (admin, finance, super_admin)

partnerId.description: Move a partner-portal user to another partner org

password.description: Reset password (forces change on next login)

plate.description: Existing normalized plate (by-plate edit across a period)

isManualPaymentSetoran.description: 1 = Masuk Setoran, 0 = Tidak Masuk Setoran (manual payment only)

manualPaymentNote.description: Reason shown when Tidak Masuk Setoran

pickupAt.description: ISO 8601, or "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss" interpreted as Asia/Jakarta

passengerDetails.description: Free-form passenger details object (stored as JSON; size-bounded)
